content: The iterative self-feedback loop of Self-Refine for unsupervised output improvement can be modularly combined with multiple inconsistent perspective frameworks from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a hierarchical self-refinement system that outperforms both single-perspective Self-Refine and single-step multi-perspective reflection. This hybrid system leverages Self-Refine's strength in iterative unsupervised improvement and multi-perspective reflection's strength in revealing blind spots that a single perspective misses.
